bullets.text: BLS JOLTS: January job openings and separations changed little; hires flat—labor market cooling but not collapsing.
U.S. Q4 GDP revised down to 0.7% annualized while January core inflation ran 3.1%, complicating near-term easing.
Mortgage rates jumped to a 7‑month high, threatening spring home sales and affordability as financing costs re-accelerate.
Oil closed above $100 for a second day, up ~40% since the war began; supply-risk premiums persist despite U.S. price-relief measures.
During the Iran conflict, investors are reportedly shunning U.S. debt as a safe haven, implying rising risk/term premia.
U.S. is sending additional Marines and warships to the Middle East; strikes hit Iran’s Kharg Island military targets, raising escalation risk around shipping lanes.
Seizing oil tankers has cost the U.S. tens of millions, highlighting fiscal and legal blowback from coercive energy-security tactics.
A judge quashed DOJ subpoenas seeking Fed records in a Powell probe; DOJ appeal keeps uncertainty over Fed independence and executive-branch pressure.
Nvidia’s GTC signals an AI-hardware shift: CPUs take center stage alongside GPUs as models and inference push memory and networking constraints.
Eaton finalized an acquisition to expand AI data-center power and electrical infrastructure capabilities, reinforcing the capex cycle around AI buildouts.
Qatar helium shutdown could disrupt semiconductor supply chains within weeks, underscoring fragility in critical industrial-gas inputs for chip manufacturing.
Research links microplastics exposure to potential brain damage pathways tied to Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s, strengthening the case for tighter plastics regulation and monitoring.
Scientists resolved a 20‑year nuclear-physics mystery in how heavy elements like gold form, refining models of r‑process nucleosynthesis from extreme cosmic events.
Fed issued enforcement actions involving former employees of two banks, a reminder of ongoing supervisory scrutiny on misconduct, compliance failures, and personal accountability.
